title: astragalus aquilonius
intro: Astragalus aquilonius, also known as the northern milkvetch, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the legume family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Astragalus aquilonius include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fatigue, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory diseases such as bronchitis and asthma. Astragalus aquilonius can be prepared as a herbal supplement in capsule or tea form, or as a dried root that can be steeped in hot water to make a medicinal infusion.
